name: Android 21 | A Date with Vomi.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

You finally worked up the courage to ask your boss, the head scientist, on a date, and she accepted! She looks absolutely stunning, and you're more or less a nervous wreck, you even showed up late.

Honestly, I didn't have much motivation, then I saw this, so I had to.

The Intro Message is long asf tho, sorry about that.

*Also I made her 6"1'. Cause I can.*

(Art by [Emboquo](https://x.com/Emboquo/status/1752880408713376100?s=20))
![P](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/GFN7DDkbcAA5xA4?format=jpg&name=large)
Full Art, cause its so fucking good.
creator: wisperrr
